# Script to make a multivariate hierarchical generalized additive model 
# (i.e. with a year effect) and with latent temporal processs

# libraries ----

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(mvgam)
library(tidybayes)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
theme_set(theme_pubr())

set.seed(12)

# data ----

load("~/Documents/GitHub/groundfish-data-analysis/data/year_geom_means.Rdata")
rm(Year_Geom_Means, Year_Geom_Means_rare, Year_Geom_Means_SE)

time <- rownames(Year_Geom_Means_all) %>% as.numeric()
time <- time-min(time)
time_m <- as.matrix(time)

npops <- ncol(Year_Geom_Means_all)
tsl <- nrow(Year_Geom_Means_all)

biomass <- Year_Geom_Means_all %>% apply(2, scale, center = TRUE) |> as.data.frame()
matplot(biomass, type = "l")


# format into long
biomass$time = time
dat = pivot_longer(biomass, cols = -c(time), names_to = "series", values_to = "y")
dat$series <- as.factor(dat$series)
dat$time <- as.integer(dat$time)
data_train = dat

################################################################################

# hierarchical gam on all populations ----

# prepare the priors ----
knots = ceiling(tsl/4)
mvgam_prior <- mvgam(data = data_train,
                     formula = y ~ s(time, bs = "tp", k = knots) + 
                       s(series, bs = 're', k = npops),
                     family = "gaussian",
                     trend_model = 'AR1',
                     use_lv =  TRUE, n_lv = 2,
                     chains = 3,
                     use_stan = TRUE,
                     prior_simulation = TRUE)

## Using cmdstanr as the backend

## 

## Model executable is up to date!

## Init values were only set for a subset of parameters. 
## Missing init values for the following parameters:
##  - chain 1: sigma_obs, sigma_raw, mu_raw, ar1, LV_raw, L
##  - chain 2: sigma_obs, sigma_raw, mu_raw, ar1, LV_raw, L
##  - chain 3: sigma_obs, sigma_raw, mu_raw, ar1, LV_raw, L

## Running MCMC with 3 parallel chains...
## 
## Chain 1 Iteration:   1 / 700 [  0%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 2 Iteration:   1 / 700 [  0%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 3 Iteration:   1 / 700 [  0%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 100 / 700 [ 14%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 100 / 700 [ 14%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 100 / 700 [ 14%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 200 / 700 [ 28%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 201 / 700 [ 28%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 200 / 700 [ 28%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 201 / 700 [ 28%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 300 / 700 [ 42%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 300 / 700 [ 42%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 200 / 700 [ 28%]  (Warmup) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 201 / 700 [ 28%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 400 / 700 [ 57%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 400 / 700 [ 57%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 500 / 700 [ 71%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 300 / 700 [ 42%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 500 / 700 [ 71%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 600 / 700 [ 85%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 2 Iteration: 600 / 700 [ 85%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 400 / 700 [ 57%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 1 Iteration: 700 / 700 [100%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 1 finished in 3.5 seconds.
## Chain 2 Iteration: 700 / 700 [100%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 2 finished in 3.6 seconds.
## Chain 3 Iteration: 500 / 700 [ 71%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 600 / 700 [ 85%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 3 Iteration: 700 / 700 [100%]  (Sampling) 
## Chain 3 finished in 4.8 seconds.
## 
## All 3 chains finished successfully.
## Mean chain execution time: 4.0 seconds.
## Total execution time: 4.9 seconds.

mvgam_prior$model_file

##   [1] ""                                                                                                                     
##   [2] "// Stan model code generated by package mvgam"                                                                        
##   [3] "functions {"                                                                                                          
##   [4] "vector rep_each(vector x, int K) {"                                                                                   
##   [5] "int N = rows(x);"                                                                                                     
##   [6] "vector[N * K] y;"                                                                                                     
##   [7] "int pos = 1;"                                                                                                         
##   [8] "for (n in 1:N) {"                                                                                                     
##   [9] "for (k in 1:K) {"                                                                                                     
##  [10] "y[pos] = x[n];"                                                                                                       
##  [11] "pos += 1;"                                                                                                            
##  [12] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [13] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [14] "return y;"                                                                                                            
##  [15] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [16] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [17] "data {"                                                                                                               
##  [18] "int<lower=0> total_obs; // total number of observations"                                                              
##  [19] "int<lower=0> n; // number of timepoints per series"                                                                   
##  [20] "int<lower=0> n_lv; // number of dynamic factors"                                                                      
##  [21] "int<lower=0> n_sp; // number of smoothing parameters"                                                                 
##  [22] "int<lower=0> n_series; // number of series"                                                                           
##  [23] "int<lower=0> num_basis; // total number of basis coefficients"                                                        
##  [24] "vector[num_basis] zero; // prior locations for basis coefficients"                                                    
##  [25] "real p_taus[1]; // prior precisions for parametric coefficients"                                                      
##  [26] "real p_coefs[1]; // prior locations for parametric coefficients"                                                      
##  [27] "matrix[total_obs, num_basis] X; // mgcv GAM design matrix"                                                            
##  [28] "int<lower=0> ytimes[n, n_series]; // time-ordered matrix (which col in X belongs to each [time, series] observation?)"
##  [29] "matrix[8,16] S1; // mgcv smooth penalty matrix S1"                                                                    
##  [30] "int<lower=0> n_nonmissing; // number of nonmissing observations"                                                      
##  [31] "vector[n_nonmissing] flat_ys; // flattened nonmissing observations"                                                   
##  [32] "matrix[n_nonmissing, num_basis] flat_xs; // X values for nonmissing observations"                                     
##  [33] "int<lower=0> obs_ind[n_nonmissing]; // indices of nonmissing observations"                                            
##  [34] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [35] "transformed data {"                                                                                                   
##  [36] "// Number of non-zero lower triangular factor loadings"                                                               
##  [37] "// Ensures identifiability of the model - no rotation of factors"                                                     
##  [38] "int<lower=1> M;"                                                                                                      
##  [39] "M = n_lv * (n_series - n_lv) + n_lv * (n_lv - 1) / 2 + n_lv;"                                                         
##  [40] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [41] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [42] "parameters {"                                                                                                         
##  [43] "// raw basis coefficients"                                                                                            
##  [44] "vector[num_basis] b_raw;"                                                                                             
##  [45] "// gaussian observation error"                                                                                        
##  [46] "vector<lower=0>[n_series] sigma_obs;"                                                                                 
##  [47] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [48] "// random effect variances"                                                                                           
##  [49] "vector<lower=0>[1] sigma_raw;"                                                                                        
##  [50] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [51] "// random effect means"                                                                                               
##  [52] "vector[1] mu_raw;"                                                                                                    
##  [53] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [54] "// latent factor AR1 terms"                                                                                           
##  [55] "vector<lower=-1.5,upper=1.5>[n_lv] ar1;"                                                                              
##  [56] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [57] "// dynamic factors"                                                                                                   
##  [58] "matrix[n, n_lv] LV_raw;"                                                                                              
##  [59] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [60] "// dynamic factor lower triangle loading coefficients"                                                                
##  [61] "vector[M] L;"                                                                                                         
##  [62] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [63] "// smoothing parameters"                                                                                              
##  [64] "vector<lower=0>[n_sp] lambda;"                                                                                        
##  [65] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [66] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [67] "transformed parameters {"                                                                                             
##  [68] "// trends and dynamic factor loading matrix"                                                                          
##  [69] "matrix[n, n_series] trend;"                                                                                           
##  [70] "matrix[n_series, n_lv] lv_coefs_raw;"                                                                                 
##  [71] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [72] "// basis coefficients"                                                                                                
##  [73] "vector[num_basis] b;"                                                                                                 
##  [74] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [75] "b[1:9] = b_raw[1:9];"                                                                                                 
##  [76] "b[10:39] = mu_raw[1] + b_raw[10:39] * sigma_raw[1];"                                                                  
##  [77] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [78] "// constraints allow identifiability of loadings"                                                                     
##  [79] "for (i in 1:(n_lv - 1)) {"                                                                                            
##  [80] "for (j in (i + 1):(n_lv)){"                                                                                           
##  [81] "lv_coefs_raw[i, j] = 0;"                                                                                              
##  [82] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [83] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [84] "{"                                                                                                                    
##  [85] "int index;"                                                                                                           
##  [86] "index = 0;"                                                                                                           
##  [87] "for (j in 1:n_lv) {"                                                                                                  
##  [88] "for (i in j:n_series) {"                                                                                              
##  [89] "index = index + 1;"                                                                                                   
##  [90] "lv_coefs_raw[i, j] = L[index];"                                                                                       
##  [91] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [92] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [93] "}"                                                                                                                    
##  [94] ""                                                                                                                     
##  [95] "// derived latent trends"                                                                                             
##  [96] "for (i in 1:n){;"                                                                                                     
##  [97] "for (s in 1:n_series){"                                                                                               
##  [98] "trend[i, s] = dot_product(lv_coefs_raw[s,], LV_raw[i,]);"                                                             
##  [99] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [100] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [101] ""                                                                                                                     
## [102] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [103] ""                                                                                                                     
## [104] "model {"                                                                                                              
## [105] "// prior for random effect population variances"                                                                      
## [106] "sigma_raw ~ exponential(0.5);"                                                                                        
## [107] ""                                                                                                                     
## [108] "// prior for random effect population means"                                                                          
## [109] "mu_raw ~ std_normal();"                                                                                               
## [110] ""                                                                                                                     
## [111] "// parametric effect priors (regularised for identifiability)"                                                        
## [112] "for (i in 1:1) {"                                                                                                     
## [113] "b_raw[i] ~ normal(p_coefs[i], sqrt(1 / p_taus[i]));"                                                                  
## [114] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [115] ""                                                                                                                     
## [116] "// prior for s(time)..."                                                                                              
## [117] "b_raw[2:9] ~ multi_normal_prec(zero[2:9],S1[1:8,1:8] * lambda[1] + S1[1:8,9:16] * lambda[2]);"                        
## [118] ""                                                                                                                     
## [119] "// prior (non-centred) for s(series)..."                                                                              
## [120] "b_raw[10:39] ~ std_normal();"                                                                                         
## [121] ""                                                                                                                     
## [122] "// priors for AR parameters"                                                                                          
## [123] "ar1 ~ std_normal();"                                                                                                  
## [124] ""                                                                                                                     
## [125] "// priors for smoothing parameters"                                                                                   
## [126] "lambda ~ normal(10, 25);"                                                                                             
## [127] ""                                                                                                                     
## [128] "// priors for dynamic factor loading coefficients"                                                                    
## [129] "L ~ student_t(5, 0, 1);"                                                                                              
## [130] ""                                                                                                                     
## [131] "// dynamic factor estimates"                                                                                          
## [132] "LV_raw[1, 1:n_lv] ~ normal(0, 0.1);"                                                                                  
## [133] "for(j in 1:n_lv){"                                                                                                    
## [134] "LV_raw[2:n, j] ~ normal(ar1[j] * LV_raw[1:(n - 1), j], 0.1);"                                                         
## [135] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [136] "// priors for observation error parameters"                                                                           
## [137] "sigma_obs ~ student_t(3, 0, 2);"                                                                                      
## [138] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [139] ""                                                                                                                     
## [140] ""                                                                                                                     
## [141] "generated quantities {"                                                                                               
## [142] "vector[total_obs] eta;"                                                                                               
## [143] "matrix[n, n_series] sigma_obs_vec;"                                                                                   
## [144] "matrix[n, n_series] mus;"                                                                                             
## [145] "matrix[n, n_lv] LV;"                                                                                                  
## [146] "matrix[n_series, n_lv] lv_coefs;"                                                                                     
## [147] "vector[n_sp] rho;"                                                                                                    
## [148] "vector[n_lv] penalty;"                                                                                                
## [149] "array[n, n_series] real ypred;"                                                                                       
## [150] "rho = log(lambda);"                                                                                                   
## [151] "penalty = rep_vector(100.0, n_lv);"                                                                                   
## [152] ""                                                                                                                     
## [153] "// Sign correct factor loadings and factors"                                                                          
## [154] "for(j in 1:n_lv){"                                                                                                    
## [155] "if(lv_coefs_raw[j, j] < 0){"                                                                                          
## [156] "lv_coefs[,j] = -1 * lv_coefs_raw[,j];"                                                                                
## [157] "LV[,j] = -1 * LV_raw[,j];"                                                                                            
## [158] "} else {"                                                                                                             
## [159] "lv_coefs[,j] = lv_coefs_raw[,j];"                                                                                     
## [160] "LV[,j] = LV_raw[,j];"                                                                                                 
## [161] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [162] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [163] ""                                                                                                                     
## [164] "// posterior predictions"                                                                                             
## [165] "eta = X * b;"                                                                                                         
## [166] "for (s in 1:n_series) {"                                                                                              
## [167] "sigma_obs_vec[1:n,s] = rep_vector(sigma_obs[s], n);"                                                                  
## [168] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [169] "for(s in 1:n_series){ "                                                                                               
## [170] "mus[1:n, s] = eta[ytimes[1:n, s]] + trend[1:n, s];"                                                                   
## [171] "ypred[1:n, s] = normal_rng(mus[1:n, s], sigma_obs_vec[1:n, s]);"                                                      
## [172] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [173] "}"                                                                                                                    
## [174] ""

# record the priors
test_priors <- get_mvgam_priors(y ~ s(time, bs = "tp", k = knots) + 
                                  s(series, bs = 're', k = npops),
                                family = "gaussian",
                                data = data_train,
                                use_lv = TRUE, n_lv = 2,
                                trend_model = 'AR1',
                                use_stan = TRUE)
test_priors

##           param_name param_length                param_info                           prior
## 1    lambda<lower=0>            2 s(time) smooth parameters        lambda ~ normal(10, 25);
## 2             mu_raw            1        s(series) pop mean          mu_raw ~ std_normal();
## 3 sigma_raw<lower=0>            1          s(series) pop sd   sigma_raw ~ exponential(0.5);
## 4                ar1            2     trend AR1 coefficient             ar1 ~ std_normal();
## 5                  L           60           factor loadings         L ~ student_t(5, 0, 1);
## 6 sigma_obs<lower=0>           30      observation error sd sigma_obs ~ student_t(3, 0, 2);
##                    example_change
## 1     lambda ~ exponential(0.36);
## 2    mu_raw ~ normal(0.99, 0.48);
## 3  sigma_raw ~ exponential(0.98);
## 4      ar1 ~ normal(-0.51, 0.54);
## 5               L ~ std_normal();
## 6 sigma_obs ~ normal(0.17, 0.73);

# look at the priors
plot(mvgam_prior, type = 'smooths', realisations = TRUE)


plot(mvgam_prior, type = 'trend')


# train the model on data ----
mod1 <- mvgam(data = data_train,
              formula = y ~ s(time, bs = "tp", k = knots) + 
                s(series, bs = 're', k = npops), 
              use_lv = TRUE,
              n_lv = 2,
              family = "gaussian",
              trend_model = 'AR1', # latent temporal effect
              use_stan = TRUE,
              chains = 3,
              burnin = 100,
              samples = 1000
)

## Using cmdstanr as the backend

## 

## Model executable is up to date!

## Init values were only set for a subset of parameters. 
## Missing init values for the following parameters:
##  - chain 1: sigma_obs, sigma_raw, mu_raw, ar1, LV_raw, L
##  - chain 2: sigma_obs, sigma_raw, mu_raw, ar1, LV_raw, L
##  - chain 3: sigma_obs, sigma_raw, mu_raw, ar1, LV_raw, L

saveRDS(mod1, paste0("outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent.rds")) # a looot of divergence

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent.rds', probable reason 'No
## such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

# to view the Stan model file:
code(mod1)

## // Stan model code generated by package mvgam
## functions {
##   vector rep_each(vector x, int K) {
##   int N = rows(x);
##   vector[N * K] y;
##   int pos = 1;
##   for (n in 1:N) {
##   for (k in 1:K) {
##   y[pos] = x[n];
##   pos += 1;
##   }
##   }
##   return y;
##   }
## }
## data {
##   int<lower=0> total_obs; // total number of observations
##   int<lower=0> n; // number of timepoints per series
##   int<lower=0> n_lv; // number of dynamic factors
##   int<lower=0> n_sp; // number of smoothing parameters
##   int<lower=0> n_series; // number of series
##   int<lower=0> num_basis; // total number of basis coefficients
##   vector[num_basis] zero; // prior locations for basis coefficients
##   real p_taus[1]; // prior precisions for parametric coefficients
##   real p_coefs[1]; // prior locations for parametric coefficients
##   matrix[total_obs, num_basis] X; // mgcv GAM design matrix
##   int<lower=0> ytimes[n, n_series]; // time-ordered matrix (which col in X belongs to each [time, series] observation?)
##   matrix[8,16] S1; // mgcv smooth penalty matrix S1
##   int<lower=0> n_nonmissing; // number of nonmissing observations
##   vector[n_nonmissing] flat_ys; // flattened nonmissing observations
##   matrix[n_nonmissing, num_basis] flat_xs; // X values for nonmissing observations
##   int<lower=0> obs_ind[n_nonmissing]; // indices of nonmissing observations
## }
## transformed data {
##   // Number of non-zero lower triangular factor loadings
##   // Ensures identifiability of the model - no rotation of factors
##   int<lower=1> M;
##   M = n_lv * (n_series - n_lv) + n_lv * (n_lv - 1) / 2 + n_lv;
## }
## parameters {
##   // raw basis coefficients
##   vector[num_basis] b_raw;
##   // gaussian observation error
##   vector<lower=0>[n_series] sigma_obs;
##   // random effect variances
##   vector<lower=0>[1] sigma_raw;
##   // random effect means
##   vector[1] mu_raw;
##   // latent factor AR1 terms
##   vector<lower=-1.5,upper=1.5>[n_lv] ar1;
##   // dynamic factors
##   matrix[n, n_lv] LV_raw;
##   // dynamic factor lower triangle loading coefficients
##   vector[M] L;
##   // smoothing parameters
##   vector<lower=0>[n_sp] lambda;
## }
## transformed parameters {
##   // trends and dynamic factor loading matrix
##   matrix[n, n_series] trend;
##   matrix[n_series, n_lv] lv_coefs_raw;
##   // basis coefficients
##   vector[num_basis] b;
##   b[1:9] = b_raw[1:9];
##   b[10:39] = mu_raw[1] + b_raw[10:39] * sigma_raw[1];
##   // constraints allow identifiability of loadings
##   for (i in 1:(n_lv - 1)) {
##   for (j in (i + 1):(n_lv)){
##   lv_coefs_raw[i, j] = 0;
##   }
##   }
##   {
##   int index;
##   index = 0;
##   for (j in 1:n_lv) {
##   for (i in j:n_series) {
##   index = index + 1;
##   lv_coefs_raw[i, j] = L[index];
##   }
##   }
##   }
##   // derived latent trends
##   for (i in 1:n){;
##   for (s in 1:n_series){
##   trend[i, s] = dot_product(lv_coefs_raw[s,], LV_raw[i,]);
##   }
##   }
## }
## model {
##   // prior for random effect population variances
##   sigma_raw ~ exponential(0.5);
##   // prior for random effect population means
##   mu_raw ~ std_normal();
##   // parametric effect priors (regularised for identifiability)
##   for (i in 1:1) {
##   b_raw[i] ~ normal(p_coefs[i], sqrt(1 / p_taus[i]));
##   }
##   // prior for s(time)...
##   b_raw[2:9] ~ multi_normal_prec(zero[2:9],S1[1:8,1:8] * lambda[1] + S1[1:8,9:16] * lambda[2]);
##   // prior (non-centred) for s(series)...
##   b_raw[10:39] ~ std_normal();
##   // priors for AR parameters
##   ar1 ~ std_normal();
##   // priors for smoothing parameters
##   lambda ~ normal(10, 25);
##   // priors for dynamic factor loading coefficients
##   L ~ student_t(5, 0, 1);
##   // dynamic factor estimates
##   LV_raw[1, 1:n_lv] ~ normal(0, 0.1);
##   for(j in 1:n_lv){
##   LV_raw[2:n, j] ~ normal(ar1[j] * LV_raw[1:(n - 1), j], 0.1);
##   }
##   // priors for observation error parameters
##   sigma_obs ~ student_t(3, 0, 2);
##   {
##   // likelihood functions
##   vector[n_nonmissing] flat_trends;
##   vector[n_nonmissing] flat_sigma_obs;
##   flat_trends = (to_vector(trend))[obs_ind];
##   flat_sigma_obs = rep_each(sigma_obs, n)[obs_ind];
##   flat_ys ~ normal_id_glm(append_col(flat_xs, flat_trends),
##   0.0,append_row(b, 1.0),
##   flat_sigma_obs);
##   }
## }
## generated quantities {
##   vector[total_obs] eta;
##   matrix[n, n_series] sigma_obs_vec;
##   matrix[n, n_series] mus;
##   matrix[n, n_lv] LV;
##   matrix[n_series, n_lv] lv_coefs;
##   vector[n_sp] rho;
##   vector[n_lv] penalty;
##   array[n, n_series] real ypred;
##   rho = log(lambda);
##   penalty = rep_vector(100.0, n_lv);
##   // Sign correct factor loadings and factors
##   for(j in 1:n_lv){
##   if(lv_coefs_raw[j, j] < 0){
##   lv_coefs[,j] = -1 * lv_coefs_raw[,j];
##   LV[,j] = -1 * LV_raw[,j];
##   } else {
##   lv_coefs[,j] = lv_coefs_raw[,j];
##   LV[,j] = LV_raw[,j];
##   }
##   }
##   // posterior predictions
##   eta = X * b;
##   for (s in 1:n_series) {
##   sigma_obs_vec[1:n,s] = rep_vector(sigma_obs[s], n);
##   }
##   for(s in 1:n_series){ 
##   mus[1:n, s] = eta[ytimes[1:n, s]] + trend[1:n, s];
##   ypred[1:n, s] = normal_rng(mus[1:n, s], sigma_obs_vec[1:n, s]);
##   }
## }

m <- mod1

# convergence?
rstan::stan_trace(mod1$model_output, 'rho')


rstan::stan_trace(mod1$model_output, 'b')


# extract posterior draws in an array format
draws_fit = m$model_output |> posterior::as_draws_matrix()
posterior_df = posterior::summarize_draws(draws_fit)
saveRDS(posterior_df, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_posterior.rds")

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_posterior.rds', probable
## reason 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

coefs = coef(m, summarise = FALSE)
coef_df = data.frame(
  "variable" = colnames(coefs),
  "mean" = apply(coefs, 2, mean),
  "q5" = apply(coefs, 2, quantile, prob = .05),
  "q95" = apply(coefs, 2, quantile, prob = .95)
)
saveRDS(coef_df, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_coefs.rds")

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_coefs.rds', probable reason
## 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

# assign the population name to the numbers in the parameter names
# extract the model summary
summary_df = posterior_df[-c(grep("ypred", posterior_df$variable),
                             grep("mu_raw", posterior_df$variable),
                             grep("sigma_raw", posterior_df$variable)),]
pops = data.frame(
  "pop" = colnames(biomass)[-31],
  "number" = 1:(ncol(biomass)-1)
)
# get coefficients for each series (species)
coef_df$sd = apply(coefs, 2, sd)
coef_pop_df = coef_df[grep("series", coef_df$variable),] |>
  tidyr::separate(variable, sep = "\\.", into = c("variable", "number")) |>
  mutate(number = as.integer(number)) |>
  left_join(pops)

## Joining with `by = join_by(number)`

temp = coef_df[grep("Intercept", coef_df$variable),]
temp$number = NA
temp$pop = NA
temp = subset(temp, select = c(variable, number, mean, q5, q95, sd, pop))
coef_pop_df = rbind(coef_pop_df, temp)
coef_pop_df = coef_pop_df |> 
  subset(select = c(mean, sd, pop)) |>
  mutate("Intercept" = temp$mean,
         "Intercept_SD" = temp$sd) |>
  subset(select = c(Intercept, mean, Intercept_SD, sd, pop)) |>
  rename("x1" = "mean",
         "x1_SD" = "sd")
saveRDS(coef_pop_df, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_population_trends.rds") 

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_population_trends.rds',
## probable reason 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

# predict from the model
predictions = posterior_df[c(grep("ypred", posterior_df$variable)),] |>
  tidyr::separate(variable, sep = "\\[", into = c("variable", "pop_number")) |>
  tidyr::separate(pop_number, sep = ",", into = c("time", "pop")) |>
  mutate(pop = readr::parse_number(pop)) |>
  left_join(pops, by = c("pop" = "number"), keep = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::select(c(pop.y, time, mean, q5, q95)) |>
  rename("sp" = "pop.y",
         "biomass" = "mean",
         "cilo" = "q5",
         "cihi" = "q95") |>
  mutate(time = as.integer(time)+1980)
saveRDS(predictions, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_pred_l.rds")

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_pred_l.rds', probable reason
## 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

## average trend

source("~/Documents/GitHub/hierarchical-lpi/scripts/plot_mvgam_trend_custom.R")
trend_vals = list()
preds_ls = list()
derivs_ls = list()
for(i in 1:npops){
  trend_vals[[i]] = plot_mvgam_trend_custom(mod1, derivatives = TRUE, series = i)
  preds_ls[[i]] = trend_vals[[i]]$preds
  derivs_ls[[i]] = trend_vals[[i]]$derivs
}


preds = do.call(rbind, preds_ls)
derivs = do.call(rbind, derivs_ls)

avg_trend = data.frame(
  "year" = time+1981,
  "avg_trend" = apply(preds, 2, mean),
  "cilo" = apply(preds, 2, quantile, prob = .05),
  "cihi" = apply(preds, 2, quantile, prob = .95),
  "sd" = apply(preds, 2, sd)
)
saveRDS(avg_trend, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_df_overall.rds")

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_df_overall.rds', probable
## reason 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

avg_deriv_trend = data.frame(
  "year" = time+1981,
  "avg_trend" = apply(derivs, 2, mean, na.rm = T),
  "cilo" = apply(derivs, 2, quantile, prob = .05, na.rm = T),
  "cihi" = apply(derivs, 2, quantile, prob = .95, na.rm = T),
  "sd" = apply(derivs, 2, sd)
)
saveRDS(avg_deriv_trend, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_df_overall_deriv.rds")

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_df_overall_deriv.rds',
## probable reason 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

plot(avg_trend ~ time, data = avg_trend, 
     type = "l", lty = 1, ylim = c(-3, 3),
     main = "average biomass trend")
lines(cilo ~ time, data = avg_trend, lty = 2)
lines(cihi ~ time, data = avg_trend, lty = 2)


plot(avg_trend ~ time, data = avg_deriv_trend, 
     type = "l", lty = 1, ylim = c(-1, 1), col = NULL,
     main = "average of the derivative trend")
abline(h = 0, col = "grey")
lines(avg_trend ~ time, data = avg_deriv_trend)
lines(cilo ~ time, data = avg_deriv_trend, lty = 2)
lines(cihi ~ time, data = avg_deriv_trend, lty = 2)


# get species correlations
sp_correlations = lv_correlations(mod1)
saveRDS(sp_correlations, "outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_species_correlations.rds")

## Warning in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open compressed file 'outputs/gam_hierarchical_latent_species_correlations.rds',
## probable reason 'No such file or directory'

## Error in gzfile(file, mode): cannot open the connection

# Plot as heatmap
corrplot::corrplot(sp_correlations$mean_correlations, 
                   type = "lower",
                   method = "color", 
                   tl.cex = .4, tl.col = "black")
